# Shyara Marketing — llms.txt

> Shyara Marketing is a digital marketing and technology services brand under Shyara Tech Solutions (OPC) Pvt. Ltd. We help businesses in India and globally grow their digital presence through social media management, advertising campaign management, website development, and app development. Our pricing is public, our deliverables are fixed, and every client owns everything we build for them.

## About Shyara Marketing

Shyara Marketing provides transparent, execution-focused digital marketing and technology services for small and growing businesses. We work directly with business owners — no call centers, no hidden fees, no vague promises.

**Legal Name**: Shyara Tech Solutions (OPC) Pvt. Ltd.
**Website**: https://marketing.shyara.co.in
**Contact**: marketing.shyara@gmail.com | +91 9584661610 (WhatsApp)
**Business Hours**: Monday–Saturday, 9am–7pm IST
**Location**: India (serving clients globally)
**Instagram**: https://instagram.com/shyaramarketing
**LinkedIn**: https://www.linkedin.com/company/shyaratechsolution

---

## Services

### Social Media Management
Monthly plans for Instagram, Facebook, and Google Business Profile management.

- **Starter Plan**: Rs. 7,999/month — 4 reels, 8 image creatives, Google Business Profile optimization, engagement management, daily stories
- **Growth Plan**: Rs. 14,999/month — 8 reels, 12 creatives, strategic ad planning, local audience targeting, free ad assistance (most popular plan)
- **Scale Plan**: Rs. 20,000/month — 12 reels, 16 creatives, personalized AI business insights, actionable customer preference data
- 3-month minimum commitment, then monthly billing with no further lock-in
- Content calendar managed entirely by our team — clients approve before publishing
- Zero hidden fees on ads — ad budget stays the client's ad budget

URL: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/services/social-media

### Ads Campaign Management
End-to-end campaign management on Meta (Facebook & Instagram), Google Ads, and YouTube.

- **Pricing**: 20% of monthly ad budget as management fee (paid in advance)
- **Minimum recommended ad budget**: Rs. 5,000/month
- **Included**: Free static image ad creatives, daily optimization, weekly WhatsApp performance summaries, monthly detailed reports
- **Add-on**: Video ad editing available at Rs. 2,000 per video
- Clients always retain full ownership of their ad accounts
- No hidden markups on ad spend

URL: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/services/ads-campaign-management

### Website Development
Business websites from simple portfolios to complex custom platforms.

- **Basic Website**: Local businesses, portfolios, consultant sites. Typical timeline: 3–5 business days
- **E-commerce / Booking Website**: Online payments, product listings, appointment scheduling. Typical timeline: 2–3 weeks
- **Custom Website**: Marketplaces, LMS platforms, healthcare portals, complex web apps. Timeline scoped per project
- All websites: mobile-first design, SEO setup, two revision rounds included, full ownership on delivery
- CMS included for Basic and E-commerce sites so clients can update content without coding

URL: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/services/website-development

### App Development
Cross-platform mobile applications for Android and iOS.

- **Basic/Presence App**: Business profile apps, restaurant menu apps, booking apps, educational content apps. Timeline: 3–6 weeks
- **Custom/Product App**: E-commerce apps, fintech apps, healthcare management, food delivery, on-demand platforms. Timeline: 3–6 months
- Built with React Native / Flutter (one codebase for both platforms)
- Native development available for specific requirements
- Full source code ownership after payment
- We scope requirements before writing any code — no surprise timelines or costs

URL: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/services/app-development

---

## Industries Served

Shyara Marketing has delivered projects for businesses across:

- **Restaurants & Food**: Restaurant websites, menu apps, food delivery apps, social media for F&B brands
- **Healthcare & Dental**: Clinic websites, dental practice sites, appointment booking platforms, medical social media
- **Travel & Hospitality**: Travel agency websites, cab service sites, hotel booking integrations
- **Coaching & Education**: Coaching websites, LMS platforms, educational apps, tutor and trainer social media
- **Wellness & Lifestyle**: Astrologer websites, wellness service sites, beauty and salon social media
- **Retail & E-commerce**: Product websites, online stores, social media creatives for retail brands
- **Professional Services**: Consultant portfolios, CA/lawyer/architect sites, B2B service providers

---

## Key Results

- Social media clients see an average of 40% higher engagement within the first 3 months of consistent managed posting
- We have delivered complete business websites in as little as 4 business days
- Managed Rs. 2L+ in combined ad spend across clients on Meta and Google platforms
- 100+ projects completed for 50+ clients across digital marketing, websites, and apps

We have delivered 100+ projects for 50+ clients across social media, advertising, websites, and apps.

---

## Our Process

1. **Discovery Call** — Free consultation to understand your business goals before recommending anything
2. **Strategy & Plan** — Written scope document with deliverables, timeline, and pricing before any payment
3. **Execution** — We build, publish, and manage with regular WhatsApp updates throughout
4. **Review & Grow** — Monthly results reports; we adjust based on data and feedback

---

## Trust and Transparency

- First consultation is always free
- Written plan provided before any payment is required
- Social media management is on a 3-month contract (results take consistency and time)
- Clients own all deliverables: source code, assets, ad accounts, social accounts
- Honest about fit — we will say if we are not the right partner for your needs
- Privacy Policy: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/privacy-policy
- Terms of Service: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/terms-of-service
- Refund Policy: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/refund-policy
- Service Delivery Policy: https://marketing.shyara.co.in/service-delivery-policy

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**How much does social media management cost?**
Plans start at Rs. 7,999/month (Starter), with Growth at Rs. 14,999/month and Scale at Rs. 20,000/month. All plans are on a 3-month contract.

**What is the fee for ad campaign management?**
We charge 20% of the monthly ad budget as our management fee. The minimum recommended ad budget is Rs. 5,000/month. There are no hidden markups — what you pay to Meta or Google goes directly to the platform.

**How long does a website take?**
A basic business website takes 3–5 business days. An e-commerce or booking website takes 2–3 weeks. Custom platforms are scoped per project.

**Do clients own their website, app, or ad accounts?**
Yes. Full ownership of all deliverables — website code, app source code, ad accounts, and all brand assets — is transferred to the client on delivery.

**Is there a contract for social media management?**
Yes. Social media management is on a 3-month contract. Social media growth depends on consistency — regular posting, engagement, and content rhythm build results over time. The 3-month period ensures enough runway to grow the audience and show measurable results.

**What platforms do you run ads on?**
Meta (Facebook and Instagram), Google Search and Display, and YouTube.

**Do you work with businesses outside India?**
Yes. While we are based in India, we serve clients globally. All communication is via WhatsApp and email.
